heading: CYBERSECURITY AND ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE TRAINING REQUIRED: CERTAIN EMPLOYEES AND OFFICIALS
operative_text: Each state agency shall identify state employees who use a computer to complete at least 25 percent of the employee's required duties. At least once each year, an employee identified by the state agency and each elected or appointed officer of the agency shall complete a cybersecurity training program certified under Section 2054.519 and an artificial intelligence training program certified under Section 2054.5193.
_note: Statute covers both state agencies and local governments. Subsection (f) lists exemptions for employees on military leave, FMLA leave, workers' compensation leave, extended leave, or denied access for noncompliance. Effective September 1, 2025 per latest amendments (H.B. 3512, 89th Leg.).
